messages.emergencySubject: Check In Safe missed check-in alert
messages.emergencyBody: Hello. In the Check In Safe app, my safety check-in was not completed within the scheduled time. Please try contacting me.

notifications.reminderTitle: Your check-in time is coming up
notifications.reminderBody: There are 2 hours left until your scheduled check-in.
notifications.deadlineBody: Please open the app and record your check-in now.

home.heroDescription: Leave a quick signal that you are safe today.
home.checkInSuccessBody: Your next check-in schedule has been updated.
home.noCheckInYet: There is no check-in record yet.
home.missedBody: The scheduled check-in time has passed. You can quickly message an emergency contact if needed.
home.noContactsBody: Please add an emergency contact first.
home.composerErrorTitle: Unable to open the message app
home.composerErrorBody: Please check the device SMS or email app and try again.
home.missingPhone: The selected contact does not have a phone number.
home.missingEmail: The selected contact does not have an email address.

contacts.title: Emergency contacts
contacts.empty: There are no saved emergency contacts yet.
contacts.validationContactRequired: Please enter at least a mobile number or an email address.
contacts.validationPhoneInvalid: Please check the mobile number format.
contacts.savedBody: The emergency contact is ready to use.
contacts.updatedBody: The emergency contact information has been updated.
contacts.deleteConfirmBody: If you delete it, quick messages will no longer be available for this contact.

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsHelper: Get reminders 2 hours before the deadline and again at the deadline.
settings.notificationsExpoGoHelper: Notifications are limited in Expo Go. Use a development build or a store build instead.
settings.notificationsUnavailableTitle: Notifications are unavailable in Expo Go
settings.notificationsUnavailableBody: Android Expo Go limits notification support. Try again in a development build or a published app.
settings.privacyHelper: Before Play Store submission, connect a privacy policy hosted at an HTTPS URL.
settings.privacyErrorTitle: Unable to open the policy link
settings.privacyErrorBody: Set a valid HTTPS privacy policy URL and try again.
settings.exportHelper: View the currently saved data as JSON.
settings.copySuccess: The JSON data has been copied to the clipboard.
settings.copyFallback: Automatic copy may be limited on this device. Long-press the JSON below to copy it manually.
settings.exportPlaceholder: There is no exported data yet.
settings.resetHelper: Reset check-in history, contacts, interval, and notification settings to defaults.
settings.resetConfirmBody: All saved check-in history and contacts will be deleted.
settings.permissionBody: Please allow notification permission in device settings and try again.

history.title: Check-in history
history.helper: You can review recent check-ins in time order.
history.empty: There is no saved check-in history yet.
